title: Margin Index Reveal
prompt:
Create a production-ready Margin Index Reveal using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build an editorial text effect in which a numbered margin index changes the emphasis of one sentence at a time. Selecting a numbered marker moves a single magenta rule beside the active phrase, while inactive phrases remain fully readable and quiet. Place the effect inside a light Bento panel with #F4F5F6 around it, white surface, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 copy, and #4A4A4F metadata. Magenta is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or scramble text so rapidly that it becomes inaccessible.

Use a semantic heading and real buttons for the three index markers, with aria-pressed on the active marker and a polite live region announcing the selected phrase. Every marker must be a 44px target and retain a visible 3px dark focus ring. Click, Enter, and Space perform the same selection. Hover may lift a marker 2px in 180ms and press may compress it 1px in 90ms. Move the margin rule with a stiffness 320, damping 26 spring and crossfade phrase weight and helper text over 180ms. The sentence must retain a meaningful reading order without motion.

At 320px, stack the marker row above the sentence and prevent line clipping; on larger previews, allow the marker column to sit beside the text. Keep AA contrast and avoid timers, random values, storage, remote media, or network calls. Prefer transform and opacity. Honor prefers-reduced-motion with an immediate change or 120ms fade. Return full TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:

Make the signal easy to scan.

*/ .uiwiki-margin-index{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-margin-index button{min-width:44px;min-height:44px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:900}.uiwiki-margin-index button[aria-pressed="true"]{border-bottom:4px solid #db2777}.uiwiki-margin-index h2{border-left:2px solid #ececee;padding-left:16px;color:#111}.uiwiki-margin-index button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-margin-index *{transition:none}}
